title: Airtight Detergent Dispenser with Measuring Cup, Detergent Washing Powder Storage Box, Laundry Powder Box, Storage Container for Detergent, Food Container, 2300 ml, CYKJ-2302-2
features: Exquisite material: detergent storage is made of high-quality PET and PP materials, which are not easy to break or deform, easy to clean and durable. Highly transparent bottle body, visual design, easy to check the remaining capacity.

Integrated scale: washing powder storage box has a capacity of 2300 ml and has an integrated scale. The scale is clear and easy to read. The remaining amount is visible at a glance. You can use it according to the quantity and refill it at any time. The large diameter bottle neck design makes it easy to refill and does not spill anything.

Silicone sealing ring: the detergent dosing aid is equipped with a silicone sealing ring, which is waterproof and dustproof to prevent items from getting wet and leaking. The beveled design with eagle beak allows for smooth pouring without leaking, so the amount used can be easily controlled every time.

Use Detergent/Washing Powder: The washing powder dispenser is compact and can be easily placed in the cabinet or on the countertop. Suitable for detergent, washing powder, shower gel, shampoo etc. After each use, simply wash with dishwashing liquid and water, and it is ready for use again.

WIDE RANGE OF APPLICATIONS Not only suitable for cleaning products, but also for beans, flour, snacks, rice, nuts and other foods, keeping your food dry and free from insects or mice, as well as the oxidation of water and air.
description: What advantages does our dosing aid washing powder offer offer? The detergent box for powder is made of high-quality PET and PP materials that do not easily break or deform, easy to clean and durable. Capacity 2300 ml, with built-in scale, the scale is clear and easy to read, the remaining amount is clear at a glance, pick it up according to the quantity and refill it at any time. Silicone sealing ring design, waterproof and dustproof, prevent items from getting wet and leaking. The eagle beak design allows for even pouring without leaks, so the amount used can be easily controlled every time. Not only suitable for detergent, washing powder, shower gel, shampoo etc., but also for beans, flour, snacks, rice, nuts, etc. Features: Material: PET, PP. Capacity: 2300 ml. Colour: clear. Package includes: 1 x airtight detergent dispenser with measuring cup. After sale warranty: If you have any questions about the detergent dispenser, please contact us in time and we will solve your questions as soon as possible. Please refer to the actual product. Thank you for your understanding.
